description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds Doxygen documentation on push to the main branch and deploys it to GitHub Pages. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment with permissions to read actions, write contents, and write pages. It should install Clang, Doxygen 1.11.0, and graphviz, then generate documentation using Doxygen Awesome CSS Themes version 2.3.3, and finally deploy the documentation to the gh-pages branch.
